final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing cinematic still of a cyberpunk future city at night.

Style/medium: cinematic concept art, cyberpunk aesthetic inspired by Blade Runner and Akira, photorealistic rendering
Composition: wide establishing shot, low angle looking up at towering skyscrapers, 24mm wide-angle lens, deep depth of field
Subject: dense cluster of futuristic megastructures with flying cars weaving between buildings, rain-soaked streets below
Scene/backdrop: dystopian metropolis at night, layered vertical architecture, dense urban sprawl, perpetual rain
Lighting/mood: harsh neon signs casting colored glow, wet surfaces reflecting light, atmospheric haze, melancholic and dystopian
Color palette: deep blue and purple as dominant base, cyan and magenta neon accents, warm orange street lights as contrast
Materials/textures: wet asphalt with puddles, corroded metal surfaces, glowing LED panels, rain droplets on glass
Avoid: clean utopian aesthetic, daylight, cheerful mood, generic sci-fi, 8K stuffer words
